name: arch
description: Print architecture type or run select architecture

options.description: Add the native 32-bit architecture to the list of architectures
Add the native 64-bit architecture to the list of architectures

options.name: -c
options.description: Clear the environment that will be passed to the command

options.name: -d
options.description: Delete the named environment variable from the command's environment

options.name: -e
options.description: Assign the given value to the variable in the command's environment

options.name: -h
options.description: Print a help message and exit
